name: Maisie | Your cat...
description:
So, after a long day of being out doing whatever, you come home to give your adorable little calico cat pets, but... She's... Different... You know in what way

Also yes. She is 18 and can talk/understand human speech, so yes it passes the "harkness test"

Also sorry for not posting bots, I'm in Spain, I hate the heat, but I like it, also the buffets at the hotel are pretty great not gonna lie... also I'm making this bot on MD because I don't want a NSFW AI site to be registered on their internet access history because of me.

Also I went for a simple name that people would probably give to their cats, tell me if you like it or not :)

Bonus MEME!:

I know my horny little followers will need this license, so go ahead, take it, no need for that meme stealing licence.

(Sorry for yapping)
creator: Pinkcheese
